# Support

## Getting Help

| Type of Question | Where to Ask |
|-----------------|--------------|
| Stuck on a lesson, test, or assignment | [Open a Help Request](../../issues/new?template=help.yml) |
| Grade dispute or wrong score | [Open a Dispute](../../issues/new?template=wrong-tier.yml) |
| Bug in the platform or workflow | [Report a Bug](../../issues/new?template=report-bug.yml) |
| False or outdated course content | [Report Content Issue](../../issues/new?template=false-content.yml) |
| Video suggestion | [Suggest a Video](../../issues/new?template=suggest-video.yml) |
| Feature suggestion | [Open a Discussion](../../discussions) |

## Response Times

| Priority | Target Response |
|----------|----------------|
| 🔴 Blocked (can't submit at all) | < 24 hours |
| 🟡 Stuck on concept or test | < 48 hours |
| 🟢 General question | < 5 business days |

Community members often answer faster — especially in the `help-wanted` label queue!

## Self-Help Resources

Before opening an issue, try:

1. **Re-read the chapter content** — most questions are answered there
2. **Check the error message carefully** — the grader always includes a hint
3. **Search existing issues** — your question may already be answered
4. **Read the [Documentation](https://manojpisini.github.io/opencourses/docs)** — the For Students section covers enrollment, grading, and certification in full

## All Issue Templates

| Template | Use For |
|----------|---------|
| `enroll.yml` | Enroll in a course |
| `quiz-submit.yml` | Submit chapter test answers |
| `quiz-attempt.yml` | Submit a chapter code assignment |
| `project-submit.yml` | Submit a course project |
| `final-test.yml` | Submit the final test (triggers certificate) |
| `report-bug.yml` | Report a platform bug |
| `false-content.yml` | Report wrong or outdated content |
| `suggest-video.yml` | Suggest a video replacement |
| `wrong-tier.yml` | Dispute a grade or difficulty classification |
| `help.yml` | Request help when stuck |

## Community

We're a small, friendly community of developers learning in public.
Please follow our [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
